queries.question: Which passengers use priority boarding and family boarding on United Airlines flights?
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.Name 
FROM Passengers JOIN Flights ON Passengers.FlightID = Flights.FlightID JOIN Airlines ON Flights.AirlineID = Airlines.AirlineID
WHERE (Passengers.BoardingType = "Priority Boarding" OR Passengers.BoardingType = "Family Boarding") AND Airlines.Name = "United Airlines"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?passengers p:hasFlights ?flights .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w2 .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?boardingtype_w) = "Priority Boarding" || STR(?boardingtype_w2) = "Family Boarding")) && STR(?name_w) = "United Airlines"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which passengers use priority boarding and family boarding on United Airlines flights?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?passengers p:hasFlights ?flights .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w2 .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?boardingtype_w) = "Priority Boarding" || STR(?boardingtype_w2) = "Family Boarding")) && STR(?name_w) = "United Airlines"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?passengers p:hasFlights ?flights .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?passengers p:name ?name .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w .
  ?passengers p:BoardingType ?boardingtype_w2 .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?boardingtype_w) = "Priority Boarding" || (STR(?boardingtype_w2) = "Family Boarding" && STR(?name_w) = "United Airlines")))
} }
}
